message.content:
@startuml
participant "Service" as Service
participant "Access token guard" as AccessTokenGuard

subgraph Auth_microservice
    participant "Session module" as SessionModule
    participant "Auth module" as AuthModule
endsubgraph

Service -> AccessTokenGuard: request
AccessTokenGuard -> SessionModule: get headers
AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
    AccessTokenGuard -> Service: 401
end

AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: get access token from header
AuthModule -> AccessTokenGuard: validate access token
AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: result of validation

alt [Access token is Invalid]
    AccessTokenGuard -> Service: 401
end

AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: get embedded client id from access token
AuthModule -> AuthModule: extract id

alt [Client id is missing]
    AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: error
    AuthModule -> AccessTokenGuard: 401
end

AccessTokenGuard -> AuthModule: client id
AuthModule -> AccessTokenGuard: modify request with client id
AccessTokenGuard -> Service: modified request

@enduml
